content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test repeated, reordered, corrected, collided, moved, partial, and retried feed versions converge without duplicate effects.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Replay Convergence model · Theory Feed Ts Replay…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Replay Convergence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Replay Convergence model · Theory Feed Ts Replay…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 1150 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove scoped identity, typed upsert outcomes, revisions, tombstones, and replay convergence; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test repeated, reordered, corrected, collided, moved, partial, and retried feed versions converge without duplicate effects.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Replay Convergence model · Theory Feed Ts Replay…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Calling the same async function twice proves replay safety.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-ts-replay-convergence-1eeix0.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-ts-replay-convergence-1eeix0(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_feed_ts_replay_convergence_1eeix0\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?ingestionAttempts < 10)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?convergedAttempts < 10 \|\| convergedAttempts > ingestionAttempts)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?revisionCases < 3)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?duplicateEffects > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.
